commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `formatKeyList` helper to `Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs`, uses it in missing-key warnings/errors, and adds self-test assertions for short and truncated lists.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a developer-tooling diagnostic improvement. Source inspection confirms current main reports only missing-key counts, while the PR body now shows after-fix output with key names.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the branch has no concrete code defect for automation and is ready for ordinary maintainer review/check gating.

target.title: Show missing locale keys in checker
target.body:
## Summary
- make `Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs` include the actual missing localization keys in warnings/errors
- truncate long missing-key lists so large catalogs stay readable
- cover the new formatting helper in the script self-test

## Behavior proof
Before this change, the locale checker only reported counts, for example:

```text
[de] Warning: Missing 2 keys.
[es] Warning: Missing 142 keys.
```

After this change, the same check identifies the keys directly while truncating long lists:

```text
[de] Warning: Missing 2 keys: Individual credits, Workspace.
[es] Warning: Missing 142 keys: %@ is unavailable in the current environment., %@ left, %@ · %@, %@: %@ · %@ tokens, %@: %@%% used, %d more items, %d unreadable item(s) skipped, %d%% in deficit, %d%% in reserve, %dd, About CodexBar, Add Account..., ... +130 more.
[zh-Hans] Warning: Missing 2 keys: terminal_app_subtitle, terminal_app_title.
```

## Tests
- `node Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs --test`
- `node Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs`
- `git diff --check`
- `make check`

## Risk
- Developer-tooling output only; no app/runtime behavior changes.

## Review focus
- Whether the warning format gives enough detail without making large locale gaps too noisy.
target.author: kiranmagic7

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
